name: Gooey Input
summary: A playful form input component featuring gooey, liquid-like animations that create organic, blobby transitions and interactions, adding fun personality to data entry experiences.
detailedDescription: The Gooey Input component transforms standard form inputs into playful, interactive elements with gooey, liquid-like animations. When users interact with the input - focusing, typing, or submitting - the component responds with organic, blobby transitions that feel almost alive. The gooey effect is achieved through SVG filters or clever CSS blur/contrast combinations that make elements appear to merge and separate like liquid droplets. Visual feedback includes the input border appearing to stretch and flow, submit buttons that morph organically on click, and success states that bubble up satisfyingly. The effect maintains full functionality while adding delightful personality to otherwise mundane form interactions. Perfect for playful brand identities, creative portfolios, apps targeting younger audiences, or any context where adding fun, unexpected interactions to forms enhances engagement. The component balances whimsy with usability, ensuring the gooey effects enhance rather than impede the core data entry function.
purpose: Transform mundane form inputs with playful gooey animations
Add organic, liquid-like personality to data entry
Create delightful micro-interactions during form use
Support playful, fun brand identities through interaction design
Balance whimsy with usability maintaining core function
behavior: Applies gooey SVG filters creating liquid appearance
Animates input borders stretching and flowing on focus
Morphs buttons organically on click interactions
Creates bubbling success states after submission
Maintains full form functionality despite visual effects
Responds to typing, focus, and submit states
Uses blur/contrast techniques for gooey illusion
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
